message:
Fix site label to trigger on any infrastructure change

The previous logic required ALL files to be outside src/content/,
which meant PRs with mixed content and infrastructure changes
wouldn't get the site label. Now triggers when ANY file is outside
src/content/.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,9 +31,6 @@ integration:
 # === Infrastructure ===
 
 site:
-  - all:
-      - changed-files:
-          - any-glob-to-any-file:
-              - "**/*"
-          - all-globs-to-all-files:
-              - "!src/content/**"
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "!src/content/**"
